query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "planbench-xl: evaluating long-horizon planning of llm tool-use agents " computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides a canonical benchmark and empirical evaluation for the exact same mechanism (LLM tool-use agents performing multi-step planning) and dependent variables (task completion rates, error handling, sequential reasoning) that the user's question regarding "Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents" investigates. It serves as a critical related-work reference for establishing the current state-of-the-art and baseline performance in this specif
